posts.author: gtatcpi (Garrick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I’ve been experiencing delays building my app in Monday Vibe - the chat log gets stuck on “Vibe’s Code Generator is bringing your app to life”. I let it run for over an hour with no success. I’ve tried using a different browser, clearing my cache and browsing data, reloading the webpage, and logging out to no avail. I’d greatly appreciate any advice!!
